chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 930 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.5522/2025 (Ex./A) 2. For orders on MA No.5523/2025 (R/Surety) 28.10.2025 None present for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2. This application is filed by applicant Sagheer Ahmed Bhangar seeking return of surety document. As per contents of the application, supported by the available record, it seems that accused Basheer Ahmed Bhangar, who on 06.12.2024, was granted protective bail for a period of five days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing an original special savings certificate of such amount, has surrendered before the learned trial Court within prescribed period and obtained interim pre-arrest bail on 09.12.2024, which, however, has been recalled by dismissing the bail application, as is evident from order dated 23.12.2024, annexed with this application. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and, in view of the aforesaid position that the accused surrendered before the trial Court within specified period, does not oppose the application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
